title: Transforming Enterprise Systems
into Connected Intelligence
hero.subtitle: We architect and deliver end-to-end Salesforce ecosystems that unify customer data, automate critical workflows, and drive compound revenue growth.

problems.title: Fragmented Customer Intelligence
problems.description: Critical customer data trapped in disconnected silos — CRM, ERP, marketing platforms, and legacy databases — making it impossible to deliver a unified experience.

problems.title: Stalled Digital Transformation
problems.description: Digital initiatives that drag on for years, consuming budget and executive confidence. Without a proven methodology, projects become expensive liabilities.

problems.title: Legacy System Burden
problems.description: Aging on-premise systems consuming 70% of IT budgets on maintenance alone, leaving zero room for innovation. Every delay widens the competitive gap.

problems.title: Inability to Scale Operations
problems.description: Manual processes and rigid architectures that buckle under growth. When your business expands, technology should accelerate momentum, not throttle it.

platformNodes.label: AI & Agentforce
platformNodes.description: Generative agents and predictive models driving autonomous operations.

platformNodes.label: Data Cloud
platformNodes.description: Real-time engine unifying transactional and historical customer profiles.

platformNodes.label: Analytics & Tableau
platformNodes.description: Deep business intelligence and predictive dashboards.

platformNodes.label: CRM Solutions
platformNodes.description: Core Customer 360 apps spanning Sales, Service, and Commerce.

platformNodes.label: Integration & MuleSoft
platformNodes.description: Unified API gateway connecting all legacy systems and SaaS apps.

processSteps.title: Discovery & Assessment
processSteps.description: Deep-dive into your business processes, technology landscape, and strategic objectives to build a comprehensive current-state audit.

processSteps.title: Strategy & Roadmap
processSteps.description: Craft a phased transformation roadmap with clear milestones, resource plans, and ROI projections aligned to business priority.

processSteps.title: Architecture & Design
processSteps.description: Design composable, future-proof solution architectures leveraging Salesforce best practices, integration patterns, and security frameworks.

processSteps.title: Agile Development
processSteps.description: Build iteratively in two-week sprints with continuous stakeholder feedback, ensuring every feature delivers tangible business value.

processSteps.title: Testing & Quality Assurance
processSteps.description: Rigorous automated and manual testing across unit, integration, UAT, and performance layers to ensure enterprise-grade reliability.

processSteps.title: Deployment & Training
processSteps.description: Seamless production release with comprehensive change management, role-based training, and hypercare support to drive adoption.

processSteps.title: Ongoing Optimisation
processSteps.description: Continuous platform monitoring, quarterly health checks, and proactive enhancements to ensure your investment compounds value.

ourCloudsQuote: From business prototyping to enterprise application development and from mobile application development to 24/7 support & customization: VCS is at the heart of the complete software spectrum of services on Salesforce CRM.

staffAugmentation.title: Elite Staff Augmentation
staffAugmentation.subtitle: Get instant access to certified, pre-vetted Salesforce and Vlocity technical experts to accelerate your project velocity.

quickFacts.title: Niche Resourcing Competence
quickFacts.description: Demonstrated competence in headhunting and resourcing premium technology and architecture skills.

quickFacts.title: Turnkey Hiring Projects
quickFacts.description: Own and deliver entire engineering teams for turnkey software development projects.

quickFacts.title: Proprietary Search Software
quickFacts.description: A proprietary AI database search platform that reduces recruiter turnaround time by 60%.

quickFacts.title: Executive to Entry Levels
quickFacts.description: One-stop recruitment solution ranging from enterprise program directors to developer trainees.

hiringApproach.title: Profile Sourcing & Scoring
hiringApproach.description: Shortlist sourced profiles based on strict client criteria. Our recruiters score applicants based on certifications, experience, and past project delivery.

hiringApproach.title: Initial Screen Interview
hiringApproach.description: Conduct deep screening calls to verify basic qualifications, remote setup capability, communication skills, and professional availability.

hiringApproach.title: Standard Skill Testing
hiringApproach.description: Administer structured, timed tests evaluating language speaking capabilities and core software programming skills.

hiringApproach.title: Technical Vetting Panel
hiringApproach.description: F2F or video panel technical interview where our in-house senior Salesforce architects and technology leaders review domain expertise.

hiringApproach.title: Client Review & Align
hiringApproach.description: Share fully vetted profiles, screen results, and technical scores with the client. Coordinate client video interviews for final alignment.

hiringApproach.title: Background Verification
hiringApproach.description: Perform background verification of references, past employment, and credentials in partnership with specialized 3rd-party vendors.

implementationLifecycle.title: Implementation & Delivery Roadmaps
implementationLifecycle.subtitle: Discover our proven, structured methodologies that guarantee quality, compliance, and rapid time-to-market for enterprise platforms.

salesforce.description: Align project objectives with business goals, establish team governance, and outline project scopes.
Conduct business process workshops to capture detailed system requirements and design solution blueprints.
Iterative system building, custom coding, automated testing, data loads, and training.
details: Configure standard objects and custom LWC
Ensure quality and run user training

salesforce.description: Continuous platform evolution, support services, and routine release updates.

vlocity.description: Audit business requirements and prioritize vertical Vlocity capabilities.
Allocate certified OmniStudio and Vlocity developers, and establish progress tracking metrics.
Build high-speed guided user journeys using OmniStudio OmniScripts, FlexCards, and Integration Procedures.
Thorough system verification, defect management, and user sign-off.
Run user adoption training and deploy modular components securely using Salesforce DX or Copado.
details: Communicate release updates to business users

vlocity.description: Establish continuous system health checking, optimization, and post-go-live managed support.
details: Analyze business value and track user progress
